description_long: This is a large, crumpled paper bag labeled 'Domédia Charbon de Bois', which translates to 'Domédia Charcoal'. The bag is primarily beige with black and dark blue accents, and features printed graphics of skewered food, barbecue utensils, and various text in French. The front and back display prominent branding and product information, while the sides show additional details, barcodes, and usage instructions. The bag appears to be filled, giving it a bulky, irregular shape, and the top is loosely gathered and wrinkled. The material looks like thick, untreated kraft paper, typical for charcoal or bulk snack packaging, and the bag is designed to be carried and opened by hand.
description: A large, beige and black Domédia Charbon de Bois paper bag with printed graphics and branding, filled and crumpled at the top. The bag features French text, barbecue imagery, and a bulky, irregular shape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main Domédia branding, product name, and barbecue graphics prominently on the beige and black paper bag.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the crumpled profile, barcode, and additional product information in smaller text.
description_view_2: Back view with similar branding and graphics as the front, but with less prominent imagery and more text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more product details, crumpled paper texture, and a partial view of the front label.
attribute_brand_logo: A rectangular Domédia logo is visible at the top front and back, featuring a white square and text on a dark background.
